subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Narcissa Casad Purdon, spoken on 1912-10-09
subcodes.first_line: Your mother? Blessed!... You must be thankful to God for having such a daughter for she writes down everything I say…. There are some times when the favors of God descend without man asking for them, without request on the part of man.
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @differences in human capacity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @many are called but few are chosen, @service to others; to the Cause of God
